tasks.name: Plate Audit
tasks.description: Gather all the plates in a consolidated area and post a photo of all the plates in the teams chat prior to marking this task completed

tasks.name: Loaner Audit
tasks.description: Using Mission Control via garage, filter for service loaners in Cypress and verify there are no loaners stored at offsite. If there are any loaners stored at offsite, quickly retrieve them before marking this task completed.

tasks.name: Box Audit
tasks.description: Take all the keys from the offsite key drop off box and post a photo in the teams chat to confirm keys have been grabbed.

tasks.name: Clear Overflow
tasks.description: Audit vehicles in overflow parking and kick out any vehicles with either no date, or a date 2+ days out.

tasks.name: Clear Trade-in Parking
tasks.description: Open up every space in the trade-in parking zone.

tasks.name: Pull and Charge next days cars
Pull-Onsite all cars for the day after tomorrow

savedTasks.name: Clear Trade-in Parking

savedTasks.description: Gather all the plates in a consolidated area and post a photo of all the plates in the teams chat prior to marking this task completed

savedTasks.name: Loaner Audit
savedTasks.description: Using Mission Control via garage, filter for service loaners in Cypress and verify there are no loaners stored at offsite. If there are any loaners stored at offsite, quickly retrieve them before marking this task completed.

savedTasks.name: Clear Overflow
savedTasks.description: Audit overflow parking and kick outside any vehicles either with no date or scheduled 2+ days later. If the vehicle is scheduled for the following day pull it into QC, if the vehicle is scheduled for the day after, put it back into the washline.
